nodes.name: Sticky Note

parameters.content:
## Trigger on a new Gumroad sale
### Requirements
- A [Gumroad]() account
- A product listed. We used ours [here]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}
- Head to Settings > Advanced, and create a new application

### Set up
- Paste your access token on this Gumroad sale trigger

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note1

parameters.content:
## Connection to [MailerLite]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} newsletter 
### Requirements
- A [Mailerlite]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} account
- A subscriber group created
- Generate a new API from the Integrations menu

### Set up
- You will first need to create the subscriber with a simple Mailer lite node
- In the second node call the endpoint to [assign that same subscriber to the group]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} you created manually on Mailerlite. For example, we named the group "Gumroad"
- To get the group id, we ran a node that calls the ["list groups" endpoint]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} and we appended it to the url.

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

## Load into CRM
### Requirements
- Set up your api and credentials for Google Sheets. You can find the n8n docs [here]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}
- Append the row to your table with your desired data collected previously

nodes.name: add subscriber to MailerLite

nodes.name: Sticky Note3

parameters.content:
## Why assign the subscriber to a group? 
In [MailerLite]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} you can set up an automation that when a new subscriber is added into a group, a new email sequence begins, which allows you to send multiple emails to this user at a specific frequency.

This is a very powerful feature to funnel users to engage with your products or services.
